title: Armored Assault applies SPD plus four and AL plus two

plan.title: Armored Assault applies SPD plus four and AL plus two
plan.summary: Equip Armored Assault to a primary creature and verify the printed SPD and AL bonuses.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the bonuses come only from Armored Assault.

steps: Player 1 plays Armored Assault and equips it to their primary creature.
Read equipped creature effective SPD and AL.
manualVerification: Confirm both bonuses apply only while Armored Assault remains equipped.
riskNotes: Uses effective stat output for SPD and AL.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Armored Assault equipped stat modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
